title: BIG4 Port Hughes Holiday Park
description: Simple accommodations in a relaxed beachfront resort offering dining, mini-golf & an outdoor pool.
address: 16 South Terrace, Port Hughes SA 5558, Australia
hotelDescription:
On tree-lined grounds next to a beach along the Spencer Gulf, this laid-back resort on the Yorke Peninsula is 10 minutes' walk from the Port Hughes Jetty and 69 km from Highway A1.
 The simple 2- to 3-bedroom villas and cabins provide kitchenettes or kitchens, plus living rooms, flat-screen TVs and DVD players. Some quarters have balconies, gulf views and/or bunk beds. Wi-Fi is offered.
 Amenities include a casual tavern eatery and 2 BBQ areas, as well as an outdoor pool, mini-golf and a basketball court. Kids' playgrounds, and guest laundry and fish-cleaning facilities are available, as are beach access, parking and campsites.
